original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Jack, Chloe, William, and Luke. Jack remarked, "Luke is a knight". Chloe remarked, "Jack is a knave or William is a knight". William commented, "If Luke is a knight then Jack is a knight". Luke said, "Jack is a knight and Jack is a knave." So who is a knight and who is a knave?
